title: Nami’s Position Under Arlong
scene: On page 1, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami’s role with Arlong becomes harder to understand as loyalty, fear, and survival overlap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Currently, it is July of 1999. As predicted by Nostradamus, it is the month when the world will be destroyed by the King of Angolmore. (And as such, the world (government has called for Angolmore's arrest. (His appearance is pictured as above.) His punishment shall

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
